case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT DISPOSITION: 54,400.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF TRACY SACCA RE CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE OF JAMES ASHER (18-032) (TRANSACTION ID # 64529880) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $27,400.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY SAMUEL LASSER ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JAMES ASHER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $27,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11469 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ASHER, JAMES
